Client Stories

Words from
those who know

Trusted by
Lumen Orvea Noctis Solara Arcane

Alex transformed our brand entirely. The new identity increased our premium perception significantly — clients now ask us how we afford such a sophisticated look.

🌿
Camille Rousseau
Founder · Aurore Studio
★★★★★

The web redesign was delivered ahead of schedule and exceeded every expectation. Conversion rates jumped 40% in the first month. Exceptional craft, exceptional process.

💼
Marcus Chen
CEO · Verdant Finance
★★★★★

Rarely do you find a creative who understands business as deeply as the aesthetics. Alex bridges that gap brilliantly — strategic thinking wrapped in beautiful execution.

🏛
Sophia Andersson
Director · Opal Architecture
★★★★★

Working with Alex was one of the best investments we made in our early stage. The brand identity became the foundation we built everything on — investors noticed immediately.

✦

Co-founder · Noctis Labs

Transparent
pricing

Every project is unique. These packages serve as a starting point — custom scopes always available upon inquiry.

Starter
$1,800
Per project
  • Brand Identity System
  • Logo Design (3 concepts)
  • Color & Typography
  • Brand Guidelines PDF
  • 2 Revision Rounds
  • UI/UX Design
  • Web Development
  • Priority Support

Studio
$4,500
Per project
  • Full Brand Identity
  • Logo + Full Asset Suite
